codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies VAL-WATERFALL-001. In handleV1Loader, getRecipientSignatures({ recipientId: recipient.id }) and getTeamSettings({ teamId: document.teamId }) now run concurrently via Promise.all, and the follow-up destructuring preserves the previous recipientSignature behavior. I found no additional independent sequential awaits in this loader that could be parallelized without changing behavior.

summary: Pass. The feature correctly parallelizes the independent getRecipientSignatures and getTeamSettings calls in the sign V1 loader, preserves behavior, and shows no correctness or maintainability issues in the reviewed diff and transcript skeleton. No shared-state gaps were identified.
